
  Usage: git-wrangler push [--force] [--force-unsafe]
  Description: Pushes local commits to remote for all tracked repositories
  Category: Remote Operations

    Iterates through Git repositories found in the current directory and its
    immediate subdirectories, checks if there are changes to push, and performs
    a Git push operation with optional force flag. --force uses
    --force-with-lease; --force-unsafe performs a raw force push after
    confirmation.


  Options:
      --force         (optional) Forcefully pushes changes using --force-with-lease.
      --force-unsafe  (optional) Performs a raw --force push after confirmation.


  Examples:
      git-wrangler push
      git-wrangler push --force
      git-wrangler push --force-unsafe
